title: chrysopsis villosa var. foliosa
intro: Chrysopsis villosa var. foliosa, also known as hairy fruited goldenaster, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Chrysopsis villosa var. foliosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
